content:
This is a piece of feedback for... Way way later in the development cycle now, because of how much game design/development power it would require.

But one of the things that kept me playing even when story had me stuck was events. I was lucky to fall right into fun ones at the start, like Lily's event with it's special orison mechanic and Sorells event. Even the Elsworth expedition one with the expeditioners.

Each event having a skill tree, and quite a substantial mechanic that you could build/mess around with. I somewhat miss that with arc2 events tending to be a single gimmick relic and a single fight.
thread_title: Arc 2 events are kind of boring in comparison to arc 1's events

content: gelot event was cool tbh
thread_title: Arc 2 events are kind of boring in comparison to arc 1's events

content: It appears that I am being ignored. Well, you've lost another paying player.
I am a story skipper but I just tested this out. It is damn bad. Highly suggest the lines be fixed so that it doesnt need to auto scroll or let people scroll themselves
This was a 4 line message. But the first two lines scrolled down by itself and there is no way to go back up.

Supporting this, I agree with all of the points mentioned above. I’ve been really enjoying the game since I started around a week ago and the story, lore, etc. is amazing, and it feels frustrating having to open up the dialogue history in the top right just to reread what someone said because I tapped twice on accident and the game auto scrolled to the bottom of a block of text. It’s been a persistent issue for me in almost every chapter, and while I ignored it at first it really really started to disrupt the story for me as I got more and more invested in it, especially during key moments. Either increasing  the size of the visible text box so it can fit more text or just adding a scroll bar to the dialogue so I can scroll back up instead of being stuck at the bottom of a paragraph would be immensely helpful
I agree. The scrolling is a bit annoying

Thank you for your suggestion. I will pass it on to the production team
There have been quite a few bugs in recent days, so we will prioritize addressing them. We did not intentionally ignore players' suggestions, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused🙏
💭「Processing」PLEASE remove the auto-scroll.
They don't respond as fast unless pinged, I do agree w the points you've set out and honestly they Cld js make the text box scrollable instead of just the text history.
That wld be an easy fix that solves it for me, font and sentence spacing aside
mhm agree
tho usually i just hold the screen and it autoplays fast and i just read fast
not all can or want to read fast
if this is a software limitation, they should honestly just revert it as it was before

No worries, really appreciate u and the team being open to suggestions from the fan base. Some people don’t realize how good we have it to have a developer that openly communicates with the community on discord like this, I am really thankful for the openness.
Ho, this communication is absolutely fantastic and appreciated, I and others are personally vocal because we care and know that they can take suggestions
that’s my bad for misphrasing, I didn’t mean to diss anyone giving suggestions like this. most people are really civil, just the few that were being openly rude
Neither of the options are selectable, the vfx you get from tapping confirms it's not a screen issue.

content: Will there be any consideration on changing the rule on the dive that deducts points every time a turn happens in battle? A lot of teams(poison, counter, so on) require you to to set up for a couple turns so you can’t use different teams/explore with options. And it counts standard battles as well, so you can’t explore without being punished.
Yeah, the turn reduction is not really conducive to skill expression and limit the teams you can use to have the best results

content: ✅「Resolved」9-5 Story Dialogue Bug

I first noticed this when trying to complete story mode achievements that say "Deal atleast X dmg in a single turn in elite/final battle."

I run Castor in my team so I make use of the plume corrosion. I do all my set up, the enemy has enough HP for me to get the achievement if I successfully burst it that turn. I do my turn and burst it, but upon finishing the map the achievement was marked as "Not Achieved."

I think I've also noticed in general that "turn damage" number displayed in battle on the top right does not match with the actual damage that I do when corrosion is involved. I did not actually record video or screenshots of this phenomenon, but I can make sure to do so a little later if necessary.
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: this isnt a bug
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: it's not? mb then. so just for clarification what does "total damage" actually mean, is it like raw damage before modifiers? does it also not count say the multiplier from vulnerable?
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: oh I did a search through the channel (should've done that before actually mb) and apparently it's a separate mechanic called "HP loss" that's kinda of confusing but very interesting
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: yeah hp loss is the only thing that goes through enemy dmg reduction effects
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: anything that contributes to total dmg (basically everything else) is affected by cocoon, reinforce, invuln
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.

content: Maybe it could appear as a damage stat like how counter and poison have their own
thread_title: CORROSION and TOTAL DAMAGE not reflecting properly.
